name: Holly Futures Co., Ltd.
summary: Holly Futures Co., Ltd. operates as a futures company in Mainland China and Honk Kong. It primarily offers commodity and financial futures brokerage services; asset management services; investment consulting; and risk management services. The company also provides financial assets investment products, including securities, funds, and wealth management products. In addition, it offers hedging and warehouse receipt services. As of December 31, 2020, it had 39 futures branches and 6 sub-branches. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Nanjing, the People's Republic of China.
